system.name: Daily API
system.description: Backend service providing the daily.dev developer news feed, GraphQL API, background event processing, and community engagement layer.

people.name: Authenticated User
people.description: Registered daily.dev user accessing the feed, comments, squads, and personalization features.

people.name: Anonymous User
people.description: Unauthenticated visitor accessing public feed and post content.

external_systems.name: PostgreSQL
external_systems.description: Primary relational database with master/replica replication for all domain entities.

external_systems.name: Redis
external_systems.description: Cache, Pub/Sub relay, rate limiting, and real-time subscription transport.

external_systems.name: Google Cloud Pub/Sub
external_systems.description: Async event bus used to dispatch background worker jobs from the API.

external_systems.name: ClickHouse
external_systems.description: Columnar database for post analytics events and user profile analytics.

external_systems.name: Temporal
external_systems.description: Durable workflow orchestration for notification delivery workflows.

external_systems.name: Cloudinary
external_systems.description: Cloud image storage, transformation, and CDN delivery.

external_systems.name: Customer.io
external_systems.description: Transactional and marketing email delivery for user events.

external_systems.name: OneSignal
external_systems.description: Mobile and web push notification delivery.

external_systems.name: GrowthBook
external_systems.description: Feature flagging and A/B experiment allocation.

external_systems.name: Paddle
external_systems.description: Subscription billing and payment processing for Plus plans.

external_systems.name: MeiliSearch
external_systems.description: Full-text search engine (used in local development).

relationships.description: Sends GraphQL queries and mutations over HTTPS
Reads public feed and posts over HTTPS
Reads and writes all domain data via TypeORM
Caches query results, manages rate limits, and relays GraphQL subscriptions
Publishes domain events to trigger background workers
Writes post view and analytics events
Schedules and monitors notification delivery workflows
Uploads and transforms post and user images
Syncs user events and triggers transactional emails
Sends push notifications to mobile and web clients
Evaluates feature flags and A/B experiment variants per request
Processes subscription events and billing webhooks
